author: y4rr
content:
Landed the trait surface + 12 distributions; remaining 17 split out to #608.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-distributions\`

### Trait additions in \`lib.rs\`
Six new methods on \`Distribution<T>\`:
- \`cdf(value)\` / \`icdf(q)\` — default returns \`InvalidArgument\` (no closed form)
- \`mean\` / \`mode\` / \`variance\` — same default
- \`stddev\` — default returns \`sqrt(variance())\`

The default impls keep concrete distributions backward-compatible; concrete distributions override what they can express in closed form.

### Implementations
| Distribution | cdf | icdf | mean | mode | variance |
|--------------|-----|------|------|------|----------|
| Normal       | ✓ (erf)   | ✓ (erfinv) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Uniform      | ✓   | ✓   | ✓ | — | ✓ |
| Exponential  | ✓   | ✓   | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Laplace      | ✓   | ✓   | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Cauchy       | ✓   | ✓   | NaN | ✓ | ∞ |
| Bernoulli    | ✓   | —   | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Beta         | —   | —   | ✓ | ✓ (NaN if α≤1 or β≤1) | ✓ |
| Gamma        | —   | —   | ✓ | ✓ (NaN if α<1) | ✓ |
| Poisson      | —   | —   | ✓ | ✓ (floor(λ)) | ✓ |
| LogNormal    | —   | —   | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| HalfNormal   | —   | —   | ✓ | ✓ (=0) | ✓ |
| Gumbel       | ✓   | ✓   | ✓ | ✓ (=loc) | ✓ |

### Tests
- 347 distribution tests pass (~30 new)
- \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions

### Notes
- Cauchy uses NaN for undefined mean and ∞ for undefined variance (matches torch).
- Beta / Gamma mode return NaN when the closed-form expression is undefined (concentration ≤ 1).
- Distributions where the inherent struct already had a method named \`mean\` or \`variance\` (only Poisson) need fully-qualified syntax (\`Distribution::mean(&dist)\`) to invoke the trait.

## Out of scope → #608
- StudentT, Weibull, Pareto, Kumaraswamy, VonMises
- Categorical / Multinomial / OneHotCategorical / Dirichlet
- MultivariateNormal / LowRankMultivariateNormal / MixtureSameFamily / Independent
- RelaxedBernoulli / RelaxedOneHotCategorical
- Beta / Gamma / StudentT cdf/icdf (need regularized incomplete beta / gamma — new dep)
